auth.secureNote: Single Sign-On via your organization's identity provider. Sessions are encrypted end-to-end.
auth.welcomeBack: Sign in to the knowledge graph
auth.welcomeBody: Multi-tenant GraphRAG platform — tenant-scoped authorization, knowledge graphs for the enterprise.

errors.Configuration: The identity server is misconfigured. Please contact an administrator.
errors.AccessDenied: You do not have access. Contact your organization administrator if needed.
errors.Verification: The sign-in link expired. Please try again.
errors.OAuthSignin: Could not reach the identity server. Try again in a moment.
errors.OAuthCallback: Sign-in failed while receiving the identity server response. Try again.
errors.OAuthCreateAccount: Could not create an account from the identity server.
errors.EmailCreateAccount: Could not create an account with this email.
errors.Callback: The sign-in link is invalid or expired. Try again.
errors.AccountNotFound: This account is not authorized on this system.

tenants.title: Your tenants
tenants.subtitle: Pick a tenant to work in. Your role in each tenant is shown below.

roleHint.owner: Highest role — delete tenant, invite members.
roleHint.member: Member — access Documents, Chat, Knowledge graph.

create.heading: No tenants yet
create.description: Your account doesn't belong to any tenant yet. Create your first one to start uploading documents and building a knowledge graph.
create.label: Tenant name
create.errorTaken: A tenant with this name already exists.
create.errorGeneric: Could not create the tenant. Please try again.

errors.networkBody: Couldn't reach GMRAG2. Check your network and try again.
errors.unauthorizedBody: Your session has expired or is invalid. Sign in again to continue.
errors.forbiddenBody: This account hasn't been granted access. Contact your tenant administrator.
errors.serverBody: GMRAG2 is temporarily unavailable. We've been notified — try again shortly.
errors.unknownBody: Something went wrong loading this data. Retry or sign in again.

documents.title: Documents
documents.dropHere: Drag and drop a PDF file here, or click to select
documents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
